description: Jupyter notebook for Spark/Python code execution in Fabric

definition_parts.description: Python source code (cells separated by '# CELL ********************' markers)

flags.--lakehouse: Lakehouse ID to bind as default lakehouse

notes: Cell source in ipynb must be array of strings (one per line with \n), not a single string
Use --strip-output on get-definition to remove cell outputs/execution_count
Run with --wait to poll until completion (default timeout 600s)
--lakehouse injects trident metadata for default lakehouse binding
Spark cold start on small capacity can take 2-5 minutes
